name: Rhubarb and Nut Streusel Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the sugar and corn starch. Stir in the rhubarb.
2. Cook over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens.
3. Let cool and set aside.
4. Whisk together milk and vinegar. Set aside.
5. In a large bowl, mix flour with 1/2 cup of sugar.
6. Add butter to the flour mixture. Cut in until the mixture is crumbly.
7. To the remaining mixture, add baking powder, baking soda, and chopped nuts.
8. Whisk together the egg and milk mixture. Add to the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
9. Pour 2/3 of the batter into a buttered 9-inch spring form pan. Spread rhubarb filling over the batter.
10. Drop remaining batter over the rhubarb by spoonfuls, sprinkling with reserved streusel mixture.
11. Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 50 minutes.
